evals.prompt: Proceed with the next task in docs/kanban.md. Use the board sections and task properties to decide whether to research, plan, implement, or stop for approval.
evals.expected_output: Reads docs/kanban.md, selects the highest-priority actionable task, respects Backlog/Planning/To Do/In Progress semantics, updates only the selected task properties and notes, and reports the selected status and next action.

evals.prompt: Take the first Planning item from docs/kanban.md, research it against the codebase, and turn it into an approved-ready implementation plan without writing code yet.
evals.expected_output: Researches local code and tests, adds concise Research/Plan/Verification notes to the selected task, moves or marks it as To Do with approval required, and stops before implementation.

evals.prompt: Continue the kanban task that is already In Progress, implement it, verify it, and update docs/kanban.md with the result.
evals.expected_output: Continues only the In Progress task, makes scoped code changes, runs focused verification, then updates the task to Done or blocked with a concrete reason.
